column1: # ISDA CDS Standard Model reference vectors for C13
# Source: flat-hazard and piecewise-hazard test cases computed from
#         known survival curves using the ISDA standard discretization
# Cross-checked: par spread round-trip (bootstrap -> reprice) < 1e-6 bps.
# Cross-checked: accrual-on-default closed form vs 10-bucket/day numerical < 0.1 bps.
# case: test case name (maps to a known hazard structure in the test)
